# HoverCard

A hover card component that displays rich content in a floating card when hovering over a trigger element. Unlike tooltips, hover cards can contain interactive content.

## Import

```jsx
import { HoverCard } from "@onlinesales-ai/ui";
```

## Sub-components

| Component | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `HoverCard` | The root component that manages hover card state. |
| `HoverCard.Trigger` | The element that shows the hover card on hover. |
| `HoverCard.Content` | The floating content panel. |
| `HoverCard.Arrow` | An arrow pointing from the card to the trigger. |
| `HoverCard.Positioner` | Controls the positioning of the hover card. |

## Props

### HoverCard

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `open` | `boolean` | - | Controlled open state of the hover card. |
| `onOpenChange` | `(details: { open: boolean }) => void` | - | Callback when the open state changes. |
| `positioning` | `object` | - | Positioning options (e.g., `{ placement: "bottom" }`). |
| `openDelay` | `number` | `300` | Delay in milliseconds before the hover card opens. |
| `closeDelay` | `number` | `300` | Delay in milliseconds before the hover card closes. |

## Usage

### Basic Hover Card

```jsx
<HoverCard>
  <HoverCard.Trigger asChild>
    <Link href="#">@johndoe</Link>
  </HoverCard.Trigger>
  <HoverCard.Positioner>
    <HoverCard.Content>
      <HoverCard.Arrow />
      <HStack gap="4">
        <Avatar name="John Doe" src="/images/john.jpg" />
        <Box>
          <Text fontWeight="bold">John Doe</Text>
          <Text fontSize="sm" color="gray.500">Software Engineer</Text>
        </Box>
      </HStack>
    </HoverCard.Content>
  </HoverCard.Positioner>
</HoverCard>
```

### Hover Card with Custom Positioning

```jsx
<HoverCard positioning={{ placement: "right" }}>
  <HoverCard.Trigger asChild>
    <Button variant="link">Hover for details</Button>
  </HoverCard.Trigger>
  <HoverCard.Positioner>
    <HoverCard.Content>
      <HoverCard.Arrow />
      <p>Rich content shown on hover.</p>
    </HoverCard.Content>
  </HoverCard.Positioner>
</HoverCard>
```

### Controlled Hover Card

```jsx
function ControlledHoverCard() {
  const [open, setOpen] = useState(false);

  return (
    <HoverCard open={open} onOpenChange={(e) => setOpen(e.open)}>
      <HoverCard.Trigger asChild>
        <Text cursor="pointer">Hover me</Text>
      </HoverCard.Trigger>
      <HoverCard.Positioner>
        <HoverCard.Content>
          Controlled hover card content.
        </HoverCard.Content>
      </HoverCard.Positioner>
    </HoverCard>
  );
}
```
